# Generated by `deno task blanks:audit:update` — do NOT hand-edit.
#
# Every line is a KNOWN BUG: a site shape where injecting a blank line makes the
# formatter break an invariant — leave a 2+ blank run, settle on a non-idempotent
# fixed point, fail to reparse, corrupt a leaf, or drop/double-print a comment. The
# gate fails on a line that is NOT here (a new kind of break), on a line here that no
# longer fires (a stale entry — delete it when you fix one), and on any PANIC.
#
# Counts are deliberately not pinned: they churn with every ordinary fixture PR, and a
# gate that fails per added fixture gets turned off. NON-IDEMPOTENT and every policy
# kind ARE pinned (this is a ratchet over a live bug family, born red); only a PANIC is
# never listed — that invariant is absolute, so it always fails the gate.
#
# STRUCTURAL-DIVERGENCE is NOT here at all: it is held REPORT-ONLY (fuzz-soft parity), so
# it is reported but never gated. It is excluded from this file by construction.
#
# Format: KIND<TAB>SHAPE
# shapes: 185
